## Summary

## Affected Files

## Validation

<!-- What verification did you perform? Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Markdown and frontmatter correctness for edited docs
- [ ] Mermaid export re-run (if `.mmd` sources changed)
- [ ] Relative links verified (if files were moved or renamed)
- [ ] Manual VS Code validation (if `.github/prompts/` changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is scoped to one clear outcome
- [ ] Related docs, checklists, and CHANGELOG.md updated if needed
- [ ] Assumptions, deferred work, or policy decisions called out
